@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: missing_id_before_db ‚ąß same_order(missing_id‚Üídb.findUser‚Üínot_found‚Üíaudit.log‚Üícache.set) ‚ąß one_next(err)
P: async_await ‚ąß promisify(db.findUser) ‚ąß await(audit.log) ‚ąß await(cache.set)
V: !db_err‚Üínext(err) ‚ąß !missing_id_before_db
R: loadUser
A: minimal_async_await

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor(loadUser).
Constraints: missing id check before database call and same validation order(missing_id then db.findUser then not_found then audit.log then cache.set) and one_next(err).
Plan: async/await and promisify(db.findUser) and await(audit.log) and await(cache.set).
Verify: high-risk db_err then next(err) and high-risk missing id check before database call.
Risk: loadUser.
Answer target: minimal async/await migration.
